docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 (SC-100 MARKED: "FAXED") FILED BY RUESSMAN, LAURENT AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, ROBIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT PAYS $7,500 IN COURT TODAY TO PLAINTIFF WHO AGREES TO ACCEPT. $10,000 TO RESOLVE BOTH CLAIMS. DEFENDANT WILL PAY AN ADDITIONAL $2,500.00 + $165.00 COSTS TO PLAINTIFF BY CONTINUED HEARING DATE FOR DISMISSAL OF BOTH CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY KAREN KATZ--PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 9/16/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $90.00- SERVED JUL-31-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WHITESIDE, ROBIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUESSMAN, LAURENT
